creator: portmaster@bsdforge.com
text:
Created attachment 247939
git diff for audio/aqualung

Reclaim MAINTAINERship && remove DEPRECIATED for audio/aqualung.
MIANTAINER was removed because my domain (BSDforge.com) was
unavailable for 5 days. It's back and will remain so.
The reasons for DEPRECIATED are largely inaccurate:
ffmpeg is technically optional. In fact, the GitHub Issue was
cited in bug #270194 indicates ffmpeg6 is currently supported.
Altho only mentioned for Openbsd. I have no reason to think
that I won't be able to use v6 in FreeBSD. The project is by
no means abandoned. So support from the Author will surely
be available. I'll update this port to version v1.2 in the next
weeks.

Thanks! :)

--Chris
